summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zektrix UK competition platform. Backend APIs working well with 10/13 endpoints fully functional. Frontend navigation, authentication, and UI components all working correctly. User registration and login flows tested successfully.

timeout_issues.impact: Search functionality may be slow but works when tested manually
Admin stats endpoint protected correctly but may have performance issues
Admin users endpoint protected correctly but may have performance issues

passed_tests: Wallet balance and transactions endpoints working
Homepage loads with hero section and navigation
All main pages accessible (Competitions, Winners, FAQ, Terms, Find Tickets)
Login/Register page renders correctly with all form elements
Admin endpoints properly protected with authentication

success_percentage.backend: 77% (10/13 endpoints fully working, 3 with timeout issues)
